title: CMS-Powered Website with Next.js + Payload CMS
description: Complete route for a content-managed website using Payload CMS for the admin panel and structured content, with Next.js App Router for the frontend.

steps.description: Initialize a new Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Configure Tailwind CSS v4 for styling
Install UI component library for the frontend
Set up Payload CMS — admin panel, Postgres or MongoDB database, and content collections
Add error monitoring for production visibility
Deploy to Vercel (requires an external Postgres database such as Neon or Supabase)
